/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby@3.1/lib CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/server/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/src/tui/tui_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/src/tui/tui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/src/tui/tui_input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/src/tui/tui_dialogs.cpp.o -o scheduler  libclustr.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurses.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libform.tbd -framework CoreFoundation -lproc
